summary: Phase 2 new features testing complete. Backend: 70/72 passed (97%). Frontend: 23/23 passed (100%). Two backend test failures identified as actual bugs - not test issues.

critical.issue: BUG: Duplicate top 10x action check fails due to date format mismatch. Backend checks for YYYY-MM-DD format but due_date is stored in MM/DD/YY format. Line ~1301-1306 in server.py needs to convert today date to MM/DD/YY format.

minor.issue: The planned_yesterday parameter is no longer used - bonus is auto-calculated from due_date vs created_at. Test was checking for manual planned_yesterday bonus.

issues: Console warning: shadow* style props are deprecated. Use boxShadow. (non-blocking)

action_items: FIX BUG: server.py line ~1301-1306 - Change date format check for duplicate top 10x action. Currently uses today = datetime.now(timezone.utc).strftime('%Y-%m-%d') but should use MM/DD/YY format to match stored due_date. Fix: today = datetime.now(timezone.utc).strftime('%m/%d/%y')
seed_data_creation: Test user: test_unicorn_001@example.com from iteration 1 and 2
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Phase 2 new features tested. Backend APIs for signals, contacts labels, deals notifications, goal progress, help requests, and community feed all working. One bug found: duplicate top 10x action check has date format mismatch (YYYY-MM-DD vs MM/DD/YY). Frontend tests cover CRM page (deals/contacts tabs, label filters, stage filters, add deal modal) and Community page (leaderboard, feed, directory tabs, profile icon navigation). All frontend tests pass.

features_verified.top_10x_action_signal: WORKING - creates signal with is_top_10x_action=true and sets impact_rating=10. BUG: duplicate check doesn't work due to date format mismatch.
features_verified.contact_labels_api: WORKING - GET /api/wormhole-contacts/labels returns all 6 labels without auth
features_verified.deal_close_date: WORKING - POST /api/deals accepts close_date and notifications_enabled
features_verified.deal_notifications: WORKING - GET /api/deals/notifications returns smart notifications based on priority and timing
features_verified.goal_progress: WORKING - POST /api/goals/progress updates progress and returns status with ring_color
features_verified.goal_status: WORKING - GET /api/goals/status returns calculated status with ring_color
features_verified.community_feed: WORKING - GET /api/community/feed includes type and ring_color fields

bugs_found.description: Duplicate top 10x action check uses wrong date format
bugs_found.root_cause: today = datetime.now(timezone.utc).strftime('%Y-%m-%d') produces '2026-03-04' but due_date is stored as '03/04/26'
bugs_found.fix: Change to strftime('%m/%d/%y') to match MM/DD/YY format of due_date
